name: Greenville
tagline: Revitalized Southern Charm at the Foot of the Blue Ridge
description: Greenville has transformed from a quiet textile town into one of the South's most vibrant small cities. Falls Park on the Reedy anchors a walkable downtown filled with excellent restaurants, galleries, and boutiques. The Blue Ridge foothills are minutes away, housing costs remain well below the national average, and South Carolina's low taxes make every FIRE dollar go further. For retirees seeking culture, nature, and affordability in one polished package, Greenville delivers.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – safe downtown core; standard precautions in outlying areas
quickFacts.climate: Humid subtropical with mild winters, warm summers, and moderate rainfall year-round

housing.description: 1BR apartment in the Village of West Greenville or Nicholtown area

dining.description: Casual meals out 2x/week; Southern diners and taco trucks; mostly home cooking

healthcare.description: ACA marketplace Silver plan; South Carolina premiums are moderate

transportation.description: Paid-off car with basic insurance; car essential in the Upstate

entertainment.description: Walking the Swamp Rabbit Trail, free Falls Park visits, library events; occasional movie

1M.lifestyle: A one-bedroom in West Greenville or a similar area runs about $1,100, and you cook at home most nights with a casual meal out a couple of times a week. Healthcare takes a real share of the budget. Daily life centers on the Swamp Rabbit Trail, Falls Park, and the free pleasures of a walkable downtown. It is tight but the low cost base makes it workable.

housing.description: 2BR apartment downtown or a small house in the Augusta Road neighborhood

dining.description: Dining on Main Street 3-4x/week; enjoying Greenville's acclaimed restaurant scene

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with dental and vision; comfortable deductible

transportation.description: Reliable car for Blue Ridge day trips, full coverage insurance

entertainment.description: Peace Center shows, Greenville Drive baseball, yoga studio, mountain hiking trips

2M.lifestyle: A two-bedroom downtown or a small house in the Augusta Road area, dining out several times a week on Main Street, and shows at the Peace Center. Weekends involve hiking in the Blue Ridge foothills or catching a Greenville Drive game. Good health insurance and a reliable car for mountain day trips are covered, with room left over each month.

housing.description: 3BR home in the North Main or Earle Street area with a yard and mountain views

dining.description: Regular dining at Jianna, Nose Dive, and Soby's; wine dinners and tasting events

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with comprehensive coverage and low deductibles

transportation.description: Late-model SUV for mountain excursions, premium insurance

entertainment.description: Peace Center season tickets, golf club membership, art classes, Clemson football trips

3M.lifestyle: A spacious three-bedroom in the North Main or Earle Street area with mountain views, regular dinners at Jianna and Soby's, Peace Center season tickets, and a golf membership. A late-model SUV handles mountain excursions, and there is plenty of margin for travel. At Greenville's price level, $10K a month covers a genuinely affluent life that would cost considerably more in larger Southern cities.

housing.description: Custom home in the Chanticleer or Paris Mountain area or a luxury downtown condo

dining.description: Private chef for weekly dinners, regular fine dining, exclusive wine club memberships

healthcare.description: Concierge medical practice, premium insurance, integrative wellness services

transportation.description: Luxury SUV, second vehicle, occasional flights from GSP to major hubs

entertainment.description: Country club membership, private fly-fishing guides, arts patronage, Clemson suite tickets

domesticHelp.description: Weekly deep cleaning, lawn and garden service, property maintenance

luxuryExtras.description: Mountain cabin getaways, quarterly travel, art collecting, community philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: A custom home near Paris Mountain or a luxury downtown condo, a housekeeper who comes weekly, and concierge healthcare. Regular fine dining, a country club membership, and fly-fishing trips on Upstate streams fill the calendar. Business class flights for travel and weekend getaways to a mountain cabin are well within budget. Greenville's low costs make this feel very well-resourced.

housing.description: Grand estate on Paris Mountain or sprawling property in the Cliffs communities

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive catered events, private wine dinners, farm partnerships

healthcare.description: Top concierge practice, executive wellness retreats, specialists on demand

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, private car service, chartered flights from GSP

entertainment.description: Major arts patronage, private concert bookings, international travel, exclusive club events

domesticHelp.description: Full-time estate manager, housekeeper, personal assistant, groundskeeper

luxuryExtras.description: Second home on the coast, first-class travel, art gallery sponsorships, foundation giving

10M.lifestyle: A large estate near Paris Mountain or a property in the Cliffs communities, full-time domestic help including a housekeeper and property manager, and a cook who comes in several times a week sourcing from local Upstate farms. First-class travel, a second home on the coast, and concierge healthcare are all comfortable. Greenville's small-city costs mean this budget covers premium living with very large margins.
